name: Lemon Poppy Seed Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a loaf pan or any 6-cup loaf or fluted tube pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine milk, eggs, and vanilla extract.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine dry ingredients including grated lemon zest and poppy seeds. Mix on low for 30 seconds.
5. Add butter and half the egg mixture; mix on low speed until all is moist.
6. Increase to medium speed and beat for 1 minute to aerate.
7. Scrape down sides, then add remaining egg mixture in two batches, beating 20 seconds after each addition to incorporate ingredients and strengthen structure.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 55-65 minutes (35-45 minutes in a fluted tube pan) or until a wooden toothpick comes out clean.
9. Cool cake in pan on rack for 10 minutes; invert onto greased wire rack. If baked in loaf pan, reinvert to keep bottom from splitting.
Lemon Syrup:
1. Heat sugar and lemon juice over medium heat until dissolved.
2. Brush half the syrup over the cake as soon as it comes out of the oven.
3. Cool for 10 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack. Brush the bottom with some syrup.
4. Re-invert and brush the sides with remaining syrup.
